text: The new recommendations are spot on! Found two products I actually bought. Really impressed.
My payment failed once after clicking a recommended product. Worked on retry though.
Interesting new section. Not sure how it decides what to show me but I'll give it a chance.
@PurpleMerit the new recommendations UI is slick! loving it so far
App is loading a bit slower than usual. Not terrible but noticeable.
Recommendations seem okay. Not all relevant to me but I can see the idea. Hope it improves.
I keep getting occasional errors on the recommendations page. Not always, but annoying.
Loving the personalized touch. The recommendations for my last purchase were very relevant!
Mixed feelings about the update. Some good features but also some issues.
Payment failed once today. Worked on retry but concerning.
Some of the recommended products don't match my preferences at all. Hopefully the AI learns over time?
Great concept, execution needs polish. Recommendations are sometimes off but when they're right they're great!
App seems a bit slower since the update. Not terrible but noticeable.
Recommendations are okay. Not a wow moment but also not a bad experience. Just okay.
I actually love the recommendations! Found a product I've been looking for months. Keep it up!
The feature has potential but needs some refinement. 3 stars for now.
Honestly the recommendations are brilliant for me. But I heard others are having issues so I'm nervous.
Mixed feelings. Recommendations are a nice touch but the app feels heavier and less responsive than before.
